_comment: Fixture -> host-city map. Key is 'homeslug|awayslug' (model team slugs, e.g. 'ivory-coast', 'dr-congo'); value is a city key from data/venues.json (e.g. 'dallas', 'mexico city'). The odds feed has no venue, so populate this to show stadium names and enable altitude/travel/weather adjustments. Example entries below — replace with the real schedule.
